evidence_phrases: solid demand recovery and momentum we are seeing across our key focus areas
fifth consecutive quarter of double-digit year-over-year growth
over 100% year-over-year increase in quarterly earnings
qualitative_signals.ceo_quote_primary: Our first quarter revenue grew 22% year-over-year and an above-seasonal 3.5% sequentially, highlighting the solid demand recovery and momentum we are seeing across our key focus areas of automotive, industrial and AI-server related applications.

source_quotes.results_actual.yoy_revenue_growth_pct: Our first quarter revenue grew 22% year-over-year
source_quotes.results_actual.gaap_eps: GAAP EPS was $0.32 per diluted share
source_quotes.results_actual.non_gaap_eps: Non-GAAP EPS was $0.43 per diluted share
source_quotes.results_actual.non_gaap_net_income_m: Non-GAAP adjusted net income was $19.8 million
source_quotes.results_actual.gross_margin_pct: GAAP gross profit margin was 31.8 percent
source_quotes.results_actual.operating_income_m: GAAP operating income $19.8 million (from table: Income from operations $19,765) plus non-GAAP adjustments $5.1 million
source_quotes.results_actual.operating_margin_pct: Computed from non-GAAP operating income $24.86 million divided by revenue $405.5 million
source_quotes.results_actual.free_cash_flow_m: Free cash flow (a non-GAAP measure) was $32.4 million
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.revenue_mid_b: we expect revenue to be approximately $435 million
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.non_gaap_eps_mid: Non-GAAP adjusted EPS is expected to be $0.60
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.gross_margin_mid_p: GAAP gross margin is expected to be 32.8 percent

ambiguous_items.explanation: Computed: GAAP operating income $19.765M (from Consolidated Statements of Operations table) + non-GAAP adjustments ($3.944M amortization of acquisition-related intangible assets + $1.149M board/officer retirement) = $24.858M, rounded to $24.86M. Non-GAAP operating income not explicitly stated in document.
Computed: non-GAAP operating income $24.86M / revenue $405.5M = 6.13%. Not explicitly stated in document.
Document provides GAAP gross margin guidance only (32.8%). Non-GAAP gross margin guidance not explicitly stated. Using GAAP value per R2 flagging requirement.
Computed: 32.8% - 1% = 31.8%. Based on GAAP guidance range.
Computed: 32.8% + 1% = 33.8%. Based on GAAP guidance range.
Document states '22% year-over-year' in CEO quote. Exact calculation from tables yields 22.08%. Using 22.0 as stated in narrative.
